artPrompt: An evocative scene of a towering ornate clock-faced shrine, its blank illegible dial glowing cold gold, candles and bone-white offerings massed at its base, hands creeping near the top, ashen smoke and drifting ash curling around it against a blood-dark sky, an ongoing sacred countdown radiating quiet dread, tender and monumental, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Official Doomsday Clock
text:
As long as The Official Doomsday Clock is on the battlefield and Brother Eschaton is not, it is the Doomsday Clock and hosts all doom counters.
Whenever any player rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock.
When the Doomsday Clock has twelve or more doom counters on it, it is midnight: destroy all creatures, then remove all doom counters. You may have it strike thirteen instead and start screaming.
flavorText: A backup apocalypse, in case the Brother is unavailable for the end of the world.

extras.interaction: ticks up on all table gambling
